'''Ta'a Chume's consort''' was the [[Parent/Legends|father]] of [[Kalen (Hapan)|Kalen]] and [[Isolder]]. Described by [[Ta'a Chume]] as adventurous, he once took Isolder camping on [[Dreena]]. He died while his children were small.<ref name="Court" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ta'a Chume's consort was first mentioned in ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'', a [[1994]] [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] novel written by [[Dave Wolverton]].<ref name="Court" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' {{Mo}}
